reviews.review_title: Could be good if it worked.
reviews.review_description: I was so looking forward to experiencing this. Constantly times out, even on a fiber connection and no way to get back to the point that you where were cut off. Great concept but being unable to use it, it's only a 1 star. They could have maybe included a download option.

Glitches and freezes on Oculus Go even with very fast wifi.  Have no problem with any other app or stream but Eleven Eleven freezes consistently to the point where its not possible to watch and you have to hard quit to get out of it.

The game its self is amazing the graphics are good but it as problems steaming an keeps saying theres a problem with the internet so I tested the net speed an the connection speed an both where find 
I'm using a Samsung s9 + so I'm wondering if is this just a problem on the gear vr I hope you can fix this bug as the game its self is one of the better ones on the market
Awesome graphics, details and good character stories. but wheres the exploration mode and other cool options thats available for the oculus rift version?

I figured that months after it's release, it would be fixed. However it is still continuing to freeze up and Skip past huge chunks of the story. Unfortunately I didn't watch it until a few days after I purchased it, so I don't have the option of a refund. Do yourself a favor and don't purchase this waste of money. They've abandoned the effort, and will not be fixing it. Hopefully Oculus will help prevent this fraudulent application from taking more money from unsuspecting viewers, and take it off the market as it has not, still does not, and I doubt I ever will work well.
Video stops and starts frequently, making it difficult to watch on my oculus go. Needs an update to fix this!

Story line is easy to understand. It stops in progress and is difficult to determine how to continue the next episode. Only one episode appears to be accessible. The graphics and 360 degree digital emersion is incredibly good!
